pi_items.source: GitHub API and direct repository inspection via https://api.github.com/repos/spring-attic/gs-maven

Verified by inspecting raw pom.xml files from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spring-attic/gs-maven/main/complete/pom.xml and https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spring-attic/gs-maven/main/initial/pom.xml

Verified by inspecting raw pom.xml files from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spring-attic/gs-maven/main/complete/pom.xml and https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spring-attic/gs-maven/main/initial/pom.xml
This is a local system path used consistently in task scripts (setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, verifier.py). Cannot be verified without access to the actual Eclipse environment or deployment system.

privileged_info_summary: The task is based on a real public source repository (Spring Getting Started guide at https://github.com/spring-attic/gs-maven, now archived). The expected Maven groupId is org.springframework and the artifactId is gs-maven, both of which are verified in the actual pom.xml files in the source repository. The source repository contains HelloWorld.java which uses joda-time library to display current time, and Greeter.java with a sayHello() method returning 'Hello world!', exactly matching the task requirements. The project includes a joda-time dependency (version 2.9.2) and is configured with the maven-shade-plugin.
